title: verbena crithmifolia var. minor
intro: Verbena crithmifolia var. minor, also known as Rock Verbena, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Verbenaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its essential oil, which has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rock Verbena include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, reduce stress, and support immune function. Rock Verbena can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and well-being.
